description: Brown leather outdoor shoes, low top styling and central lace-upsTwo-tone leather upper with strategically placed overlays, padded tongue, pull loop at the heel for ease of wear, padded insole for in-step comfortCurved midfoot, rubber midsole for cushioned comfortDual density TPU outsole with geometric lugs for grip and traction, has a raised heel, outsole reinforced onto the upper as a toe guard
